timeline.title: Senior Cuddle Researcher
timeline.summary: Focus: warmth-seeking optimization and human-proximity maximization.
highlights: Achieved 100% lap occupation rate during work-from-home hours.
Discovered that paw shakes increase treat yield by 60%.
Co-authored a paper with Lucas on optimal sunbeam sharing schedules.

timeline.title: Junior Play Companion
highlights: Developed a multi-species play protocol with Ragdoll cat brother Lucas.
Optimized chase-and-tumble sequences for maximum fun with minimum furniture damage.
Won Best Duo Award at the annual living room play session.

timeline.title: Treat Quality Intern
highlights: Evaluated 200+ treat varieties using advanced sniff-and-taste methodology.
Reduced treat waste to 0% (consumed all samples).
Developed a paw-shake-to-treat conversion pipeline with 3x throughput improvement.
